diagnostic_explanation: Both reviewers cite the same two evidence items, so there is no meaningful citation difference. The difference is in reason-code granularity: option 2 uses only conservative_entailment, while option 1 additionally marks scope_preserved. Given the claim is specifically about stability for the current context, and the evidence combines a new stability policy with a high-risk current context, option 1 more fully captures why the support applies without changing the support label. The rationales are substantively aligned rather than interpretively different, and both assign the same high confidence.
